productDisplayName: Tonga Women Black & White Printed Top
description: Style Note: Elegant and bright casual wear with a flattering Fit and impressive styling is definitely Tonga's forte, and this top from Tonga is a must for the update of your summer monsoon wardrobe. Keep it stylish and simple by pairing up this trendy top with flats and jeans. We like to describe this look as charmingly casual!Product DetailsBlack and white polka dot top, has a boat neck, with buttons at the nape of the neck, bat winged short sleeves and petal leaf design at the back Material and Care 100% polyester Hand wash in cold water separately Use only non chlorine bleach when needed Hang to dry Do not ironSize and FitRegular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size MStyle Note Elegant and bright casual wear with a flattering fit and impressive styling is definitely Tonga's forte, and this top from Tonga is a must for the update of your summer monsoon wardrobe.
